name: Ruin Rat King
description: A tangle of plague-rats moving as one body through the collapsed Court, swelling larger the longer the ruin's sickness goes unchecked.
starting_behavior: Swarms in numbers, splits when struck, infests dark corners

name: Ash Revenant
description: The smoke-and-cinder remnant of a courtier who would not leave. It drifts the ruined halls, cold to the touch, mourning a throne that no longer exists.
starting_behavior: Haunts a fixed hall, lashes out when its grief is disturbed

name: Gloom Stalker
description: A lean, light-shy predator that nests in the deepest ruin vaults, hunting by sound. The Dishonored Court's old guard-hounds, gone feral and silent.
starting_behavior: Ambushes from darkness, retreats from bright light
